title: Capitals of Countries
description: A geography round focused on matching countries with their capital cities.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of France?
What is the capital of Australia?
questions.hint: It is not Sydney or Melbourne.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Brazil?
questions.hint: It was purpose-built and became the capital in 1960.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Canada?
What is the capital of Japan?
questions.hint: It was formerly known as Edo.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Kenya?
What is the capital of Argentina?
questions.hint: It is famous for tango and sits on the Rio de la Plata.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Egypt?
questions.hint: It is on the Nile and near Giza.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of South Korea?
What is the capital of Turkey?
